name: NBHD Automation Tools
description: Typed cron pattern tools — the agent's only path to create scheduled messages. Each pattern (pure_reminder / quote_user_intent / domain_summary) has its own concrete tool with a per-pattern parameter schema; this is the structural alternative to a discriminated-union tool and to raw cron access. See CONTINUITY_cron-typed-patterns.md.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for NBHD runtime endpoint requests.
